features.name: part_select_on_multibit_input_port
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit input port with part-select operations used in multiple assignments

features.name: equiv_make_with_identical_designs
features.description: Code should include a scenario where equiv_make is used to compare two identical designs loaded from the same source

features.name: part_select_in_binary_expression
features.description: Code should include a part-select of a multi-bit wire used within a binary operation
